title: Avarizz's Modpack
description: Client mods that I use to improve vanilla gameplay in terms of optimization and usability.
body:
# Avarizz's Modpack

> Client-side mods that I use to improve vanilla gameplay in terms of optimization and usability.  Suitable for playing in singleplayer worlds or on various SMP projects.

### The main mods in the assembly:
- **Sodium** - a basic mod for all new modpacks, which will allow you to fully customize Minecraft for yourself. And also increases productivity, which also has a positive effect on the game process.
- **Essential Mod** - will allow you to customize your character with the help of various cosmetics, and also gives you the opportunity to play with friends without using third-party programs and services.
- **Bobby** - caches all previously loaded chunks, so that the next time you load, everything that was loaded will load instantly.
- **Xaero's Minimap and Xaero's World Map** - with these two mods, you no longer have to remember the coordinates of important places for you, because you can put a mark on the map, to which you can return at any time. And World Map will give you the opportunity to see all previously loaded places where you have been.

**This modpack contains a large number of texture packs and shaders, by setting which you can improve your gameplay beyond recognition.**

### Availible to download zip file with mods, resoursepacks and shaders
![Only in browser version!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2c8f98ed0e107fda3a49f51fbaae23524deebc8.png)
